projects.name: Medcord
projects.tagline: A clinical record system for an enterprise hospital management SaaS — patients, staff, EMR, equipment.
projects.stylePrinciples: Bone-paper canvas with warm ink, apothecary green as the single accent, hairlines instead of shadows, serif for thinking, mono for record. Critical-red reserved for life-threatening only.

projects.name: Irisi
projects.tagline: A slide-generation web app powered by its own React component library — one product stance, twenty-five slide packs, AI-directed.
projects.stylePrinciples: Cool-neutral near-white paper with cool-leaning near-black ink, signal blue as the single product accent, type doing the heavy lifting. The product is one stance; the slide library carries all 25 stances from the catalogue.
